name: python3-cairosvg
title: python3-cairosvg
summary: SVG to PDF/PS/PNG converter based on Cairo (Python3 library)
description:
SVG to PDF/PS/PNG converter based on Cairo (Python3 library)
CairoSVG is a SVG converter based on Cairo. It can export SVG files to PDF,
PostScript and PNG files.
The main part of CairoSVG is a SVG parser, trying to follow the SVG 1.1
recommendation from the W3C. Once parsed, the result is drawn to a Cairo
surface that can be exported to various formats: PDF, PostScript, PNG and
even SVG.
.
This package contains the Python3 version of the library.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-cairosvg because SVG to PDF/PS/PNG converter based on Cairo (Python3 library).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-cairosvg as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-cairosvg with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-cairosvg --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
